title: Department Manager Vacancy at Heritage Foods Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Heritage Foods Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Heritage Foods Retail are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Heritage Foods Retail:
Heritage Foods Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
